commands.purpose: Print SpanRegistry + MetricRegistry: every discovered #[AsSpan] / #[AsCounter] / etc across the codebase, grouped by module + class.
Fires a synthetic trace + metric to the configured OTLP endpoint. Reports round-trip time + response. Useful for smoke-testing exporter config.
Prints a summary of the last N sampled traces from local buffer (when SDK debug processor active). Dev-only.
